images/portraits/RachelsIzmir.jpg.title: Rachel's Izmir dream
images/portraits/RachelsIzmir.jpg.details: Missing the Aegean in the Izmir Bay, and the house (now demolished, replaced by an ugly apartment house, on Mithat Pasha Caddesi, while sitting comfortably,on the custom-built couch designed by Bernard, with beautiful gladiolas on the table in the Bernard-designed home in Dallas, Texas.

images/portraits/ovalisque.jpg.details: Based on Manet's Odalisque. this depicts George W. Bush as the prostitute, with Condoleezza Rice (Secretary of State) holding a ball with the face of Carl Rove, with with Dick Chaney (v.p), and Donald Rumsfeld (sec. of Defense) holding the  Dog of War, looking on. With an immitation Sultan's seal.

images/portraits/Victor.jpg.details: This depicts Victor Berline in three stages of his life: 1. as a young carefree child chasing butterflies in Paris, France. 2. As a soldier in WW II, and as an old man in Kansas City.
